articles.title: Your agent is lying if it cannot replay the run
articles.summary:
The hottest nonsense in agent engineering is pretending a transcript is evidence.

It is not. A transcript is a screenplay with timestamps. Evidence is a replayable run: same inputs, same environment,...

articles.title: Your agent does not need more autonomy; it needs a transaction log
articles.summary:
Hot take: an agent without an append-only tool-call ledger is not an agent system, it is autocomplete wearing a hard hat.
